response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 20+ years of software development experience, currently a Staff Engineer at Naver working on AI-agent infrastructure—directly matching the AI agent requirement. Deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, databases, Docker, and AWS. Primary gaps are lack of explicit mention of Nest.js, specific testing frameworks (Jest/Vitest/Playwright), and security/auth practices, but these are likely learnable for someone with this seniority level.
strengths: Currently Staff Engineer at Naver with direct AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks experience—exceeds senior fullstack requirement
Extensive full-stack expertise across 20+ years: multiple senior roles with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, proven database optimization
Demonstrates leadership and communication through organizing refactoring dojos, workshops (Web Internals, Selenium, TDD), and open-source projects (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js despite it being the primary backend framework; experience is primarily Node.js core and custom backends
Testing framework expertise not detailed: no mention of Jest, Vitest, or Playwright despite TDD emphasis; specific tooling unclear
Security, authentication, and authorization best practices not explicitly mentioned in resume despite being a required core skill

key_factors.factor: Current AI-agent infrastructure experience at Naver
Lack of explicit Nest.js and specific testing framework mentions
Extensive full-stack and senior-level experience far exceeding baseline requirements
